title: Trump delays Clayton’s nomination for intelligence director in bid to force Congress to pass voter ID bill – US politics live
summary_full: President says he will keep Bill Pulte as acting director and ‘will not approve Fisa without the Save America Act going along with it’Sign up for the Breaking News US emailDonald Trump was almost an hour late to the first working session of the day at the G7 summit in Évian-les-Bains.As he walked to his seat he stopped at the head of the table and joked, “I’m the boss.” He then also joked with press that they could stay for the (closed press) meeting, “It’s okay with me.”If they don’t behave, we’ll go right back to dropping bombs right smack in the middle of their head. Continue reading...
